name: Mexican Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
2 Italian Roma tomatoes, seeded and chopped
2 Serrano chiles, stemmed, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. To cook the pasta, bring a large pot of water to a boil with salt and oil. Cook about 8-10 minutes or until al dente, then drain well.
2. Spread the pasta on a sheet pan to cool. Once cooled, lightly coat with olive oil.
3. To make the dressing, place the oil, vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper in a jar. Cover and shake to mix well.
4. Toss the pasta, Panela cheese, onion, cucumbers, tomatoes, capers, and oregano with the dressing until well coated.
5. Chill before serving.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
